```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.7em;">re-framing</div>

 <div style="font-size:0.95em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:0.8em;">
  Skills are essentially an <span style="color:#7B2CBF;font-weight:700;">advanced practice</span> of <span style="color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">Context Engineering</span>.
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:0.6em;flex-wrap:wrap;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;">
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#C4881A;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid #E8C77E;">Context Engineering</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">⊃</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#7B2CBF;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid #E1BEE7;">Skills</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">⊃</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid #C4C3E8;">Progressive Disclosure</span>
 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">
  They solve a very real problem: <strong style="color:#5654A2;">how to give the model the right info at the right time</strong>.
 </div>

</div>
```
